titleStmt.title: SII 20.314: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 314. (B.K. No. 112 of 1938-39.) GUḌIGĒRI, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record, in characters of about the 12th Century A.D., registers a gift of land made after purchase, by the twelve gāvuṇḍas of Guḍigere for the worship of the Śiva-liṅga named Kalidēva installed by Kallimayya who also donated money with which the gift land was purchased.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya . śrī nama(ḥ)stuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracā
maracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamulastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
suragrihasaṁkuḷadiṁdaṁ parivritacūtādyanēkavṛkṣāvaḷiyaṁ ne
redirpputtamajanadiṁ dhareyoḷu guḍigeṟe karaṁ virājisutirkuṁ . naṁni
calavadaṭasaṁpratipannate cāturyavaṟemudārate jagakatyuṁnati E
nnida guṇasaṁpa(ṁ)nnargguḍigeṟeya pannirbarvvasumatiyoḷu . ja
ḷanidhi mēreya dāṁṭugu taḷarugu kanakādri neleyaneṁtuṁ
dharmakkaḷivaṁ bageyade peṁpaṁ taḷedargguḍigeṟeya pa(ṁ)nnirvvarkkaramesedaru .
keṁḍeyara kallimayanu śrī kāḷēśvaradēvara dakṣiṇadiśābhāgada
li taṁna hesaralu śrī liṁgapratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi śrī kalidēvara pūjepu
naskāranimittavāge guḍigeṟeya ha(ṁ)nnirvvarggāvuṁḍugaḷanabhyarccisi Akṣōhi
ṇiyaṁ Aṟuvattumūṟu gadyāṇa hoṁnaṁ koṭṭu sarvvabādhepari
hāravāgi haḍada mattarayidu 5 Adakke sīme lavaṭaravara maneya keyyalu
mūvatteraḍu gēṇu bāciviḍiya kōlalu mattaloṁdu 1 kaṁmmavaṟunūṟu
muriya voladalu mattalu mūṟu 2 ka(ṁ)mmaṁ mūnūṟu Adaṟoḷage dēva
rigemattaleraḍu 2 tapōdhanara bhikṣege mattalu mūṟu 3 mattaṁ śrīkāḷēśvaradēvara sthā
nācāryyarappa nirbbāṇaśaktidēvara śiṣyaḷappa śaṁkarikabbe tapōdhanara bhikṣege mēḍi A
kṣōhiṇiyaṁ koṁḍu koṭṭa mattaroṁdu 1 mattaṁ nirvvāṇaśaktidēva
ra śiṣyarappa caṁdrabhūśaṇadēvara śiṣyaru talayara mācaṇanuṁ kūragāḷime
yanuṁ niḍuguṁḍeya boppaṇanuṁ śrī kāḷēśvaradēvarige ma
ttaru yaraḍu mattaṁ tapōdhanara bhikṣege mattaru Eraḍu Antu matta
raydaṁ sarvvabādhe parihāravāgi Akṣōhiṇiyaṁ koṭṭu koṁḍu
biṭṭaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭirvva
rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 20.314 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
